title: Dayjobs
wikitext:
[]: Dayjobs!             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Feb 21, 2006 9:56 pm If the Eva characters had to go out and get "real" jobs what do you think they would be? After all even if there was no HCP to complete after the angels were beaten there would be no point to run such and expensive organization anymore. Gendo- This guy's got quite a "reputation" for himself. The best he'll find is "Do you want fries with that?" Misato- Testing the beer quality at the "Yebisu" cannery. Maya- Stalking Ritsuko "Vlad"- Would return to his job as a drunken Russian peasent farmer. "Pierre"- Might not get a job, but should get a rhinoplasty. Few people would hire.....that thing. "Nigel"- This guy is the epitome of the "eurosexual" stereotype, he ought to settle down with his partner and a run a florist's shop. "Teddy"- The front runner for the BullMoose Presidential canidate in the elections 2016, in the good 'ol US of A. Keel- Should join Section 9 and fight crime.

[]:             Quote Post by myheadexplode » Tue Feb 21, 2006 10:08 pm hmm. Shinji should be a writer of some kind, maybe making a self help series of books. Or maybe he can avert his depression by taking on directing, or maybe creating an animated series, maybe something with mentally unstable protagonists and psychological/religeous references;) Asuka should be a talk show host, or some other kind of trash tv character, like a judge judy or something.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jul 01, 2006 8:08 am Gendo - A highschool principle Misato - Gym Teacher Ritsuko - Biology teacher Rei - Department store manquine Asuka - School yard bully Shinji - house keepr

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sat Jul 01, 2006 11:18 am the kids should have a schoolife ---> too young now..... Yui could be a lawyer Gendo could be a taxman (bastards! :P) Aoba could be a metal band member Hyuga could be an graphics animator :P Maya could be aν accountant Kheel should be an evil zoo kepeer >:P Misato could be a model Ritsuko a teacher Kaji an agronomist and finally.......Sachiel could be.....a soccer team mascot!!!

Article: Dayjobs
[]: Dayjobs!             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Feb 21, 2006 9:56 pm If the Eva characters had to go out and get "real" jobs what do you think they would be? After all even if there was no HCP to complete after the angels were beaten there would be no point to run such and expensive organization anymore. Gendo- This guy's got quite a "reputation" for himself. The best he'll find is "Do you want fries with that?" Misato- Testing the beer quality at the "Yebisu" cannery. Maya- Stalking Ritsuko "Vlad"- Would return to his job as a drunken Russian peasent farmer. "Pierre"- Might not get a job, but should get a rhinoplasty. Few people would hire.....that thing. "Nigel"- This guy is the epitome of the "eurosexual" stereotype, he ought to settle down with his partner and a run a florist's shop. "Teddy"- The front runner for the BullMoose Presidential canidate in the elections 2016, in the good 'ol US of A. Keel- Should join Section 9 and fight crime.

Or maybe he can avert his depression by taking on directing, or maybe creating an animated series, maybe something with mentally unstable protagonists and psychological/religeous references;) Asuka should be a talk show host, or some other kind of trash tv character, like a judge judy or something.
